name_cn:
Gold buckle·24cm
SOLFERINO BOX·Shoulder bag
This shoulder bag is lightweight and exquisite. Italian imported box calf leather, LE CASSANDRE hardware clasp, sheepskin lining, adjustable shoulder strap for easy shoulder carrying! A versatile bag in a vintage new style, elegant and sophisticated!
Style No.:832330
Dimensions:24.5×15×8.5cm
